---
title: "demo"
listing:
  contents:
    - "*.qmd"
    - "!index.qmd"
    - "!about.qmd"
    - "!CS.qmd"
  sort: "date"
  type: table
  table-hover: true
  fields: [date, title, description, reading-time]
---

This is a Quarto website.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.
